'''鈭歞-t-th-d''' ('''kadatthedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beat|beat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beat|beat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-t-th-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadatthedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidathedoko|thidathedoko]] || [[word:jidathedoko|jidathedoko]] || [[word:shidathedoko|shidathedoko]] || [[word:kidathedoko|kidathedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
